title: erythroxylum squamatum var. orinocense
intro: Erythroxylum squamatum var. orinocense is a plant species native to South America, specifically found in the Orinoco River basin in Venezuela and Colombia. It is a type of coca plant that is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and analgesic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as headaches, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Erythroxylum squamatum var. orinocense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
